raw.objective: To determine the differences in absorption kinetics between Tegretol (CBZ) immediate and continued release formulations
raw.covariates: WT on CL, WT on Vd, formulation on Ka
raw.observations: As expected, significant differences in absorption kinetics were found between CBZ formulations. The model allows for adjusting for bodyweight and formulation only. Low concentrations were underpredicted, which could lead to issues. Much residual variability remains
raw.dose: Crossover of oral doses of immediate and continued release in patients
raw.equations: CL/F=theta1*WT+eta1 Vd/F=theta2 KaT=theta3 KaTCR=theta4 Cobs=Cipred+eps1 KaT=Ka for regular CBZ Tegretol tablets KaTCR=Ka for CBZ Tegretol Continued Release tablets
raw.parameter_values: theta1=0.0522 theta2=63.7 theta3=0.312 theta4=0.149 omega1=0.291 sigma1=0.572

omega.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

sigma.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale SIGMA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

extraction_target.residual_error: CL/F=theta1*WT+eta1 Vd/F=theta2 KaT=theta3 KaTCR=theta4 Cobs=Cipred+eps1 KaT=Ka for regular CBZ Tegretol tablets KaTCR=Ka for CBZ Tegretol Continued Release tablets
extraction_target.notes: Appendix-derived silver reference; compare with the publication before promotion to a gold tier.

study.dose: Crossover of oral doses of immediate and continued release in patients
study.objective: To determine the differences in absorption kinetics between Tegretol (CBZ) immediate and continued release formulations

covariates.raw: WT on CL, WT on Vd, formulation on Ka

normalization.omega: Values labelled OMEGA in the appendix are retained as NONMEM variances; no CV reconversion is applied.
normalization.eta: ETA distribution is inferred only when the appendix equation explicitly uses exp(ETA) or additive ETA.
normalization.source_text: The appendix row is preserved verbatim in raw; normalized fields never replace it.
